agentAbility.name: Contracted Strike
agentAbility.description: Lock on to enemies in front of the vehicle for a missile strike. A short lock fires Hydra rockets, while an extended lock launches a homing Hellfire missile for much heavier damage.

agentTrait.name: Rising Tempo
agentTrait.description: Increases base reload time, but landing hits on enemies progressively reduces it.

primaryAttack.name: Autoloader
primaryAttack.description: Fires continuously until the magazine reserve is depleted

tankAbilities.name: FASTDRAW Magazines
tankAbilities.description: Switches to a different loader with specialized shells for an alternative combat approach.

tankAbilities.name: Unload
tankAbilities.description: Refill the main gun loader and rapidly unload it in a devastating burst.
